---
title: "Quality & Scrap Analytics"
subtitle: "Cross-system pattern analysis — Sheet Metal Fabricator, Elizabeth NJ"
---

## About This Case

This project presents a cross-system quality and scrap analysis for a custom sheet
metal fabricator operating across five production lines and two shifts. The analysis
spans 36 months of production data across five source systems: ERP, MES, QMS,
Materials/WMS, and HR.

Quality and scrap data had never been analyzed in combination across these systems.
A data pipeline was built to extract, standardize, and join records into a single
analytical layer — surfacing four cross-system patterns that were invisible within
any individual source system.

---

## What's Included

**[Operations Dashboard](dashboard.html)**
A live operating dashboard showing weekly, monthly, and trailing 12-month views
of key quality and scrap metrics across the production operation.

**[Diagnostic Report](report.html)**
A full diagnostic analysis documenting the four cross-system patterns identified,
their statistical significance, and their financial impact across the 36-month
analysis period.

---

## Pipeline
